assessments.mood_stem: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following problems?

items: Little interest or pleasure in doing things
Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge
Not being able to stop or control worrying

urge_surf._audio_note: TODO(content): 3-minute guided recording pending. script_prompts below are the interim on-screen text implementing the CLINICAL_SPEC §5.2 script beats (author-written for this engine, not a clinician-reviewed verbatim script — flag for review alongside Week 1-6 lesson copy per CLINICAL_SPEC §8).
script_prompts: Notice where the urge sits in your body right now. Just notice it.
Describe the sensation plainly — tight, warm, buzzing. No story, just sensation.
Breathe slowly into that spot. In for four. Out for six.
Picture it as a wave — rising, cresting, about to fall. You don't have to do anything.
It's passing. Remind yourself what matters to you right now.
Choose one small thing for the next ten minutes. You're already through the hardest part.
